== Mathlib proof-wanted dependency guard ==
PASS: local Lean source does not reference mathlib Poincare proof-wanted shortcut names
AXIOMS: local proof-bearing assembly surface uses only standard mathlib axioms
== Objective ==
Implement a complete Lean proof of the Poincare Conjecture:
every closed, simply connected topological 3-manifold is homeomorphic to S^3.
== Prompt-to-artifact checklist ==
